table 5445913 "TSRD Calc. Cost"
{
    Caption = 'Cost';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Costs";

    //Always update archive table as well!

    fields
    {
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
        }
        field(3; "Cost Type"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Cost Type';
            NotBlank = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Cost Type"."Code";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
            begin
                if CalcCostType.Get("Cost Type") then begin
                    Rec.Description := CalcCostType.Description;
                    Rec."Transfer to Purchase" := CalcCostType."Transfer to Purchase";
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(4; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(5; Amount; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Amount';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Base Amount Type" <> "Base Amount Type"::" " then
                    FieldError("Base Amount Type");
            end;
        }
        field(6; "Base Amount Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Base Amount Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Base Amount Type';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Base Amount Type" = "Base Amount Type"::" " then begin
                    Percentage := 0;
                    UpdateCostAmount();
                end else
                    Amount := 0;
            end;
        }
        field(7; Percentage; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>%';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Percentage';
            DecimalPlaces = 0 : 5;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                Percentage /= 100;
                UpdateCostAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(8; "Allocate to Service Item"; Code[20])
        {
            AccessByPermission = tabledata "Service Item" = R;
            Caption = 'Allocate to Service Item';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Service Item";
        }
        field(9; "Allocate to Trade No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Allocate to Trade No.';
            TableRelation = "TSRM Trade No."."No." where("Service Item No." = field("Allocate to Service Item"));
        }
        field(10; "Equipment Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Equipment Line No.';
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line No." where("Forecast No." = field("Forecast No."));
        }
        field(11; "Transfer to Purchase"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Transfer to Purchase';
        }
        field(20; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(21; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(51; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Charging Method")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcCostType: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost Type";
                SalesItemChargeErr: Label 'Charging Method can only be set to Calc. Separatly if the Cost Type has a Sales Item Charge defined.';
            begin
                if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separatly" then begin
                    CalcCostType.Get("Cost Type");
                    if CalcCostType."Sales Item Charge" = '' then
                        Error(SalesItemChargeErr);
                end else begin
                    Validate("Margin %", 0);
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(52; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(53; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(54; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
        }
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
    }

    trigger OnInsert()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
    end;

    internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
    begin
        GetCalcForecast("Forecast No.");
        CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
    end;

    local procedure GetCalcForecast(ForecastNo: Code[20])
    begin
        if not HasCalcForecast then
            HasCalcForecast := CalcForecast.Get(ForecastNo);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCostAmount()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Amount := CalcForecastMgt.GetCostAmount(Rec);
    end;

    procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcCost: Record "TSRD Calc. Cost";
    begin
        CalcCost.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
        if CalcCost.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        CalcCost.FindLast();
        exit(CalcCost."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        HasCalcForecast: Boolean;
}
table 5446017 "TSRD Calc. Cost Type"
{
    Caption = 'Cost Type';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Cost Types";

    fields
    {
        field(1; "Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Code';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            NotBlank = true;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(2; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(3; "Item Charge"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Item Charge';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            NotBlank = true;
            TableRelation = "Item Charge"."No." where("TSRM Calc. Type" = filter("Purchasing costs" |
                                                                                 "External service" |
                                                                                 "Purchase Freight" |
                                                                                 "Internal Warranty" |
                                                                                 "Cost of Sale" |
                                                                                 "Sales Freight"));
        }
        field(4; "Transfer to Purchase"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Transfer to Purchase';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
        }
        field(5; "Sales Item Charge"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Item Charge';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            TableRelation = "Item Charge"."No.";
        }
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; Code)
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
    }

    trigger OnInsert()
    begin
        TestField("Item Charge");
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    begin
        TestField("Item Charge");
    end;

    trigger OnDelete()
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Mgt.";
    begin
        ServiceMgt.CheckIfTypeIsUsedOnForecast(Rec);
    end;
}
table 5446001 "TSRD Calc. External Equipment"
{
    Caption = 'Additional Configuration';
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Ext Equip Lookup";

    //Always update archive table as well!

    fields
    {
        field(1; "Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Forecast"."No.";
        }
        field(2; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
        }
        field(6; "No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = if (Type = const(Item)) Item."No."
            else
            if (Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."No." where("TSRM In Stock As" = filter("Current Asset" | "Fixed Asset"))
            else
            if (Type = const(Comment)) "Standard Text";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Item: Record Item;
                ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
                StandardText: Record "Standard Text";
                TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                ItemTemplMgt: Codeunit "Item Templ. Mgt.";
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
                ServiceItemDataMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Service Item Data mgt";
                UsedPartsTaxMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Used Parts Tax Mgt.";
                VendorItemNoMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Vendor Item No. Mgt.";
            begin
                CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
                TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
                Init();
                Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
                "No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."No.";
                "Vendor No." := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor No.";
                "Vendor Name" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Vendor Name";
                "Purchase Order Type" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Purchase Order Type";
                "Responsibility Center" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Responsibility Center";
                "Location Code" := TempCalcExternalEquipment."Location Code";
                if "Line No." = 0 then
                    "Line No." := Rec.GetNextLineNo();
                case Type of
                    Type::Item:
                        begin
                            if not Item.Get("No.") then
                                exit;
                            Description := Item.Description;
                            if Vendor.Get(Item."Vendor No.") then
                                Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                            Quantity := 1;
                            Validate("Unit of Measure", Item."Base Unit of Measure");
                            UsedPartsTaxMgt.UpdateLineOnAfterValidateNo(Rec);
                            CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
                            if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
                                DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
                        end;
                    Type::"Service Item":
                        begin
                            if not ServiceItem.Get("No.") then
                                exit;
                            case ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As" of
                                ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Current Asset":
                                    if ServiceItem."Item No." = '' then begin
                                        Commit();
                                        ItemTemplMgt.InsertItemFromTemplate(Item);
                                        ServiceItem.Validate("Item No.", Item."No.");
                                        ServiceItem.Modify();
                                    end;
                                ServiceItem."TSRM In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset":
                                    ServiceItem.TestField("TSRM Fixed Asset No.");
                            end;
                            Description := ServiceItem.Description;
                            "List Price" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Price";
                            "Direct Unit Cost" := ServiceItem."Sales Unit Cost";
                            Validate(Quantity, 1);
                            "Unit of Measure" := ServiceItem."Unit of Measure Code";
                            if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("No.") then
                                DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
                            EquipmentMgt.FillAttachedEquipmentLines(Rec);
                            ServiceItemDataMgt.FillServiceItemData(Rec);
                        end;
                    Type::Comment:
                        begin
                            StandardText.Get("No.");
                            Description := StandardText.Description;
                            CalcForecastMgt.InsertExtendedTextEquipment(Rec);
                        end;
                end;
                VendorItemNoMgt.TransferVendorItemNo(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(7; "Unit of Measure"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Unit of Measure';
            TableRelation = if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const(Item)) "Item Unit of Measure".Code where("Item No." = field("No."))
            else
            if ("No." = filter(<> ''), Type = const("Service Item")) "Service Item"."Unit of Measure Code" where("No." = field("No."))
            else
            "Unit of Measure".Code;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Item: Record Item;
                ItemUnitofMeasure: Record "Item Unit of Measure";
            begin
                if "Unit of Measure" = xRec."Unit of Measure" then
                    exit;

                if "Unit of Measure" = '' then
                    exit;

                if Type = Type::Item then begin
                    Item.Get("No.");

                    ItemUnitofMeasure.Get(Item."No.", "Unit of Measure");

                    if Item."Unit Price" <> 0 then
                        Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Price" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity)
                    else
                        if "List Price" = 0 then
                            Validate("List Price", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
                    Validate("Direct Unit Cost", Item."Unit Cost" * ItemUnitofMeasure."Qty. per Unit of Measure" * Quantity);
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(9; Type; Enum "TSRD Calc. Ext. Equipment Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Type';
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                TempCalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment" temporary;
            begin
                TempCalcExternalEquipment := Rec;
                Init();
                if TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type <> TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type::Comment then begin
                    Rec.InitOrderType();
                    Rec.InitResponsibilityCenter();
                end;
                Type := TempCalcExternalEquipment.Type;
            end;
        }
        field(10; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(12; Quantity; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Quantity';

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                UsedPartsTaxMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Used Parts Tax Mgt.";
                WrongQuantityErr: Label 'Quantity cannot be more than 1 when Type is Service Item.';
            begin
                if (Quantity > 1) and (Type = Type::"Service Item") then
                    Error(WrongQuantityErr);
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMargin();
                UsedPartsTaxMgt.CheckIsQuantityChangeAllowed(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(13; "List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'List Price';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateDirectUnitCost();
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMargin();
            end;
        }
        field(14; "Direct Unit Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Direct Unit Cost';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateDiscount();
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMarginAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(15; "Line Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Line Amount';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateMargin();
            end;
        }
        field(16; "Discount %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Discount % (List Price)';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateDirectUnitCost();
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMargin();
            end;
        }
        field(17; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
            begin
                SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                IsMarginPercentageViable(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                UpdateLineAmounts();
                UpdateMarginAmount();
            end;
        }
        field(19; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption();
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(30; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
            ObsoleteReason = 'This field has no functionality and is not required for Calc. External Equipment.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(31; "Calculate Separately"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculate Separately';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by Charging Method.';
            ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Calculate Separately" then begin
                    Validate("Show in Sales Document", true);
                    CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
                    CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
                end else
                    Validate("Margin %", 0);
            end;
        }
        field(32; "Show in Sales Document"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show in Sales Document';
            InitValue = true;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                UpdateShowInSalesOnLinkedExtEquipmentLines();
            end;
        }
        field(33; "Comments exist"; Boolean)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Sale Forecast Comment" where("Comment Type" = const("External Equipment"), "No." = field("Forecast No."),
                                                                    "Document Line No." = field("Line No.")));
            Caption = 'Comments exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(36; "Attached to Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Attached to Line No.';
        }
        field(40; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = Vendor."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
            begin
                if "Vendor No." = xRec."Vendor No." then
                    exit;
                if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
                    Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
                    "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
                end else
                    "Vendor Name" := '';
                InitResponsibilityCenter();
            end;
        }
        field(41; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
            begin
                CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
                if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end;
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
                LookupVar: Variant;
            begin
                CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed();
                if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
                    LookupVar := Vendor;
                    if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
                        Error('');
                    Vendor := LookupVar;
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end else
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
            end;
        }
        field(50; "Workshop Line No."; Integer)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Services to Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(51; "Linked to Workshop"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Workshop" where("Line No." = field("Workshop Line No."),
                                                                "Forecast No." = field("Forecast No.")));
            Caption = 'Linked to Services';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(52; "Line Amount (List Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Line Amount (List Price)';
        }
        field(54; "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)';
        }
        field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(62; "Purchase Document Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(67; "Discounted Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Discounted Sales Price';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'This field was not needed for the price options feature. #17865';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(70; "Vendor Item No."; Text[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Item No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(75; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
        }
        field(80; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;

            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
                RespCenterCode: Code[10];
            begin
                RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                if RespCenterCode <> '' then
                    Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
            begin
                RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
            end;
        }
        field(85; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            TableRelation = Location;
        }
        field(90; "Service Item Doc. Data Comment"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Document Data Comment';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(95; "Status (Purchase)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)")
        {
            Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Table field not needed #24654';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2302.241100';
        }
        field(100; "Attached Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Attached Equipmen';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(110; "Linked to Service Item"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Linked to Service Item';
        }
        field(120; "Line Action"; Enum "TSRD Service Line Action")
        {
            Caption = 'Line Action';
            ValuesAllowed = " ", "Attach", "Cap. Service";
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Replaced by Charging Method.';
            ObsoleteTag = '2402.250800';
        }
        field(121; "Charging Method"; Enum "TSRD Charging Method Ext.")
        {
            Caption = 'Charging Method';
            DataClassification = CustomerContent;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::Attach then
                    "Margin %" := 0;

                if "Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::"Calc. Separatly" then begin
                    Validate("Show in Sales Document", true);
                    CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
                    CalcForecast.TestField("Fix Price allowed", false);
                end else if ("Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::Included) or ("Charging Method" = "Charging Method"::" ") then
                    Validate("Margin %", 0);
            end;
        }
    }

    keys
    {
        key(PK; "Forecast No.", "Line No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(Key2; "Type", "No.")
        {
        }
        key(Key3; "Forecast No.", "Linked to Service Item")
        {
        }
        key(Key4; "Forecast No.", "Vendor No.")
        {
        }
        key(TSRDShowInSales; "Forecast No.", "Show in Sales Document") { }
    }

    fieldgroups
    {
        fieldgroup(DropDown; Type, "No.", Description)
        { }
    }

    trigger OnInsert()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
        InitOrderType();
        InitResponsibilityCenter();
        Rec."Calculate Separately" := not CalcForecast."Fix Price allowed";
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    begin
        TestForecastStatusOpen();
    end;

    internal procedure InitType()
    begin
        Type := xRec.Type;
    end;

    trigger OnDelete()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcForecastMgt.DeleteNonStockExtEquipment(Rec);
        CalcForecastMgt.RemoveAttachedCommentLinesEquipment(Rec);
    end;

    internal procedure TestForecastStatusOpen()
    begin
        GetCalcForecast();
        CalcForecast.TestStatusOpen();
        CalcForecast.TestSalesCalculationStatus();
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDiscount()
    begin
        if "List Price" <> 0 then
            "Discount %" := (1 - ("Direct Unit Cost" / "List Price")) * 100
        else
            "Discount %" := 0;
    end;

    local procedure UpdateDirectUnitCost()
    begin
        "Direct Unit Cost" := Round("List Price" - ("List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100)), 0.01);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateLineAmounts()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        LineDiscAmt: Decimal;
    begin
        "Line Amount (List Price)" := "List Price" * Quantity;
        "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" := "Direct Unit Cost" * Quantity;

        LineDiscAmt := Round(Quantity * "List Price" * ("Discount %" / 100), 0.01);
        "Line Amount" := (Quantity * "List Price") - LineDiscAmt;
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        "Line Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin("Line Amount", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), 0.01);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateMargin()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        UpdateMarginAmount();
        "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentage("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateMarginAmount()
    begin
        "Margin Amount" := "Line Amount" - "Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
    end;

    local procedure GetCalcForecast()
    begin
        CalcForecast.Get("Forecast No.");
    end;

    local procedure CheckIsChangingOfVendorNameAllowed()
    var
        AlreadyExistErr: Label 'Purchase document already exist for this line, Vendor cannot be changed.';
    begin
        if "Purchase Document No." <> '' then
            Error(AlreadyExistErr);
    end;

    internal procedure IsMarginPercentageViable(MarginCalculator: Interface "TSRD MarginCalculator")
    begin
        MarginCalculator.IsMarginPercentageViable("Margin %");
    end;

    procedure GetCommentLineForm() CommentForm: Text[100]
    var
        DescriptionExtension: Text;
    begin
        if Quantity <> 0 then begin
            DescriptionExtension := ' (' + Format(Quantity);
            if "Unit of Measure" <> '' then
                DescriptionExtension += ' ' + "Unit of Measure" + ')'
            else
                DescriptionExtension += ')';
        end;
        CommentForm := CopyStr(Description, 1, MaxStrLen(CommentForm) - StrLen(DescriptionExtension)) + DescriptionExtension;
    end;

    procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."Forecast No.");
        if CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        CalcExternalEquipment.FindLast();
        exit(CalcExternalEquipment."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    internal procedure InitOrderType()
    var
        UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
    begin
        UserSetup.Get(UserId());
        if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
    end;

    internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
    var
        RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
        RespCenterCode: Code[10];
    begin
        RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
        if RespCenterCode <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
    end;

    internal procedure OpenLinkedPurchaseDocument()
    var
        PurchaseInvoiceHeader: Record "Purch. Inv. Header";
        PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
    begin
        case "Purchase Document Type" of
            "Purchase Document Type"::Order:
                if PurchaseHeader.Get(PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order, "Purchase Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order", PurchaseHeader);
            "Purchase Document Type"::"Posted Invoice":
                if PurchaseInvoiceHeader.Get("Purchase Document No.") then
                    Page.Run(Page::"Posted Purchase Invoice", PurchaseInvoiceHeader);
        end
    end;

    local procedure UpdateShowInSalesOnLinkedExtEquipmentLines()
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "Forecast No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Attached to Line No.", "Line No.");
        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            CalcExternalEquipment.ModifyAll("Show in Sales Document", "Show in Sales Document");
    end;

    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
}
table 5446003 "TSRD Calc. Forecast"
{
    Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet';
    DataCaptionFields = "No.", Description;
    DataClassification = CustomerContent;
    DrillDownPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    LookupPageId = "TSRD Calc. Forecasts";

    //Always update archive table as well!

    fields
    {
        field(1; "No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(2; Description; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Description';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(3; "Vendor No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = Vendor."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if "Vendor No." <> '' then begin
                    Vendor.Get("Vendor No.");
                    "Vendor Name" := Vendor.Name;
                end else
                    "Vendor Name" := '';
                InitResponsibilityCenter();
                if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor No.")) or
                   (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Vendor Name"))
                then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
            end;
        }
        field(4; "Vendor Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Vendor Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if Page.RunModal(0, Vendor) = Action::LookupOK then begin
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end;
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Vendor: Record Vendor;
                HelperTools: Codeunit "TSR Helper Tools";
                LookupVar: Variant;
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if "Vendor Name" <> '' then begin
                    LookupVar := Vendor;
                    if not HelperTools.FindRecordUsingUpToTwoFields(LookupVar, "Vendor Name", Vendor.FieldNo("No."), Vendor.FieldNo(Name)) then
                        Error('');
                    Vendor := LookupVar;
                    if Vendor.Name = '' then
                        Vendor.FieldError(Name);
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", Vendor."No.");
                end else
                    Rec.Validate("Vendor No.", '');
            end;
        }
        field(5; "Manufacturer Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Manufacturer';
            TableRelation = Manufacturer.Code;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.ManufacturerValidate(Rec, xRec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
                UpdateDescription();
                SetCalculationCurrency();
            end;
        }
        field(6; "Category Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Category';
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Category"."Code";
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.CategoryValidate(Rec, xRec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
            end;
        }
        field(7; "Subcategory Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Subcategory';
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Subcategory"."Code" where("Category Code" = field("Category Code"));
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.SubcategoryValidate(Rec, xRec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
            end;
        }
        field(8; "Model Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Model';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "TSRM Service Item Model"."Code" where("Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code"));
            ValidateTableRelation = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
                EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                AttributeMgt.ModelValidate(Rec);
                CheckAttributesOnConfigurations();
                UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
                UpdateDescription();
                if CurrFieldNo <> 0 then
                    EquipmentMgt.TransferStandardEquipmentAndModel(Rec, xRec);
            end;
        }
        field(9; "Manufacturer Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup(Manufacturer.Name where(Code = field("Manufacturer Code")));
            Caption = 'Manufacturer Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(10; "Category Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Category".Name where(Code = field("Category Code")));
            Caption = 'Category Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(11; "Subcategory Name"; Text[50])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Subcategory".Name where(Code = field("Subcategory Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code")));
            Caption = 'Subcategory Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(12; "Model Name"; Text[100])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Model".Name where(Code = field("Model Code"), "Manufacturer Code" = field("Manufacturer Code"), "Category Code" = field("Category Code"), "Subcategory Code" = field("Subcategory Code")));
            Caption = 'Model Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(13; "Service Item No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = "Service Item";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                MachineCommSalesMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Machine Comm. Sales Mgt";
                OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                PrefillVATProdPostingGroup();
                CalcForecastMgt.ValidateServItemNoOnForecast(Rec, xRec);
                if CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Service Item No.") then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
                MachineCommSalesMgt.ValidateServiceItemNo(Rec);
                CopyUnitCostOfServiceItem();
                HandleEquipment();
                OverAllowanceMgt.SetServiceItemNoOnRetValueAllocs(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(14; "Calc. Sales Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(15; Status; Enum "TSRD Calc. Status")
        {
            Caption = 'Status';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(16; "Series Code"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Series Code';

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AttributeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Attribute Mgt.";
            begin
                AttributeMgt.SeriesValidate(Rec, xRec);
                UpdateDescription();
            end;
        }
        field(17; "Series Name"; Text[100])
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("TSRM Service Item Series".Name where(Code = field("Series Code")));
            Caption = 'Series Name';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(18; "Creation Date"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Creation Date';
        }
        field(19; "Creation by User"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Creation by User ID';
        }
        field(20; "Last Date Modified"; Date)
        {
            Caption = 'Last Date Modified';
        }
        field(21; "Last Modified by User"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Last Modified by User ID';
        }
        field(22; "Base Code"; Code[50])
        {
            Caption = 'Base Code';
        }
        field(23; "List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'List Price';
        }
        field(24; "Base Machine Net Price"; Decimal)
        {
            BlankZero = true;
            Caption = 'Base Machine Net Price';
            ObsoleteReason = 'Due to calculation changes this field has been replace by "Base Machine List Price"';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(25; "Purchase Document Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("Purchase Header" where("TSRD Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(26; "Sales Document Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("Sales Header" where("TSRD Sales Forecast No." = filter(<> ''), "TSRD Sales Forecast No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No.")));
            Caption = 'Sales Document Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(27; Closed; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Closed';
        }
        field(28; "Customer No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Customer No.';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
            TableRelation = Customer."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Customer: Record Customer;
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
            begin
                if Rec."Customer No." = '' then
                    exit;
                Customer.Get(Rec."Customer No.");
                Rec."Customer Name" := Customer.Name;
                if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Customer No.")) or
                   (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Customer Name"))
                then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
            end;
        }
        field(29; "Customer Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Customer Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(30; "Contact No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Contact No.';
            TableRelation = Contact."No.";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                Contact: Record Contact;
                DataHintMgt: Codeunit "TSR Data Hint Mgt.";
            begin
                if Rec."Contact No." = '' then
                    exit;
                Contact.Get(Rec."Contact No.");
                Rec."Contact Name" := Contact.Name;
                if (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Contact No.")) or
                   (CurrFieldNo = Rec.FieldNo("Contact Name"))
                then
                    DataHintMgt.DisplayMasterDataHints(Rec, CurrFieldNo);
            end;
        }
        field(31; "Contact Name"; Text[100])
        {
            Caption = 'Contact Name';
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(32; "List Price Conf. Options"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'List Price Configuration Options';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(33; "Configuration Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(34; "Total Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts"."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(35; "Workshop Amount Labour"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Amount (Labor)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Services Amount Labor';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(36; "Workshop Amount Parts"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Amount (Parts)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Services Amount Parts';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(37; "Workshop Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Separately" = const(false)));
            Caption = 'Services Amount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(38; "Total Costs"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Costs';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(39; "Equipment List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration List Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(40; "Equipment Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration Cost';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(41; "Equipment Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Separately" = const(false)));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(42; "Equipment (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separatly")));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(141; "Add. Config Price (Sep)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. External Equipment"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separatly")));
            Caption = 'Additional Configuration Price (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(142; "Service Amount (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Total Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separatly")));
            Caption = 'Service Amount (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(143; "Total Costs (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost".Amount where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separatly")));
            Caption = 'Total Costs (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(144; "Costs (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Cost"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separatly")));
            Caption = 'Costs (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(43; "Calc. Sales For. Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote Version No.';
            ObsoleteReason = 'New field: Version No.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2102.230700.0.0';
            TableRelation = "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast Line"."Version No." where("Forecast No." = field("No."));
        }
        field(44; "Total Sales Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts"."Discount Amount" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Total Sales Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(45; "Base Machine List Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Base Machine List Price';
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                UpdateListPrice();
                UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
                CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
                CalcForecastMgt.RecalculateSalesDiscountsOnSalesPriceChange(Rec);
                if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
                    UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
                UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
                UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
                if Rec."Base Machine List Price" <> xRec."Base Machine List Price" then
                    OverAllowanceMgt.RecreateOverAllowances(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(50; Template; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Template';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(60; "Purchase Document No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document No.';
            Editable = false;
            OptimizeForTextSearch = true;
        }
        field(61; "Purchase Document Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Purch. Doc. Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Document Type';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(62; "Service Item Created"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Created';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(70; "Location Code"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Location Code';
            TableRelation = Location;
        }
        field(80; "Calculated Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Calculated Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(CalculatedMarginLbl, ' %');
            Editable = false;
            MinValue = 0.0001;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
            end;
        }
        field(81; "Calculated Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if ((xRec."Calculated Sales Price" = "Sales Price") and ("Calculated Sales Price" <> "Sales Price"))
                    or ("Sales Price" < "Calculated Sales Price") and (Status <> Status::Released)
                then begin
                    Rec.Validate("Sales Price", "Calculated Sales Price");
                    exit;
                end;
                UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
                UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC();
            end;
        }
        field(82; "Margin %"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Margin %';
            CaptionClass = SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption('', ' %');
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
            begin
                CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
                if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                    "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
                    UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
                    "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
                end;
                UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
            end;
        }
        field(83; "Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
            begin
                if CurrFieldNo <> 0 then
                    TestStatusOpen();
                if "Sales Price" = 0 then
                    "Sales Price" := "Calculated Sales Price";
                if "Calculated Sales Price" = 0 then
                    exit;
                if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                    "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
                    "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
                end;
                UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
                if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Sales Price") then
                    UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
            end;
        }
        field(84; "Margin Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Margin Amount';
            CaptionClass = GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(SalesReceivablesSetup.GetMarginCaption(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
            begin
                TestStatusOpen();
                if not "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
                    "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitCost() + "Margin Amount";
                    "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
                    FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
                end;
                UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
            end;
        }
        field(90; "Workshop (Separate)"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Workshop"."Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Charging Method" = const("Calc. Separatly")));
            Caption = 'Services (Separate)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(95; "Conf Price with Calc. Discount"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (List Price)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price with Calc. Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Not needed anymore. Field Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost) is used instead.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2302.2411';
        }
        field(96; "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" where("Forecast No." = field("No."), "Calculate Discount" = const(true)));
            Caption = 'Direct unit cost Price with Calc. Discount';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(100; "Return Type"; Enum "TSRD Calc. Forecast Ret Type")
        {
            Caption = 'Return Type';
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                AgencyBusinessMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Agency Business Mgt.";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Fix Price is allowed for this Calculation Worksheet. You can''t change the Return Type.';
            begin
                if Rec."Return Type" = xRec."Return Type" then
                    exit;
                CheckIsReturnTypeEditable();
                if Rec."Fix Price allowed" then
                    Error(ReturnTypeErr);
                if "Return Type" = "Return Type"::"Agency Business" then
                    AgencyBusinessMgt.CheckUserSetupActivated();
                CalcForecastMgt.CheckAndDeleteRelatedData(Rec);
            end;
        }
        field(101; "Line No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Line No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(102; "Created from Template"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Calc. Forecast" where("No." = field("Template Forecast No."), Template = const(true)));
            Caption = 'Created from Template';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(103; Quantity; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Quantity';
            Editable = false;
            InitValue = 1;
            MinValue = 1;
        }
        field(104; "Template Forecast No."; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Worksheet Template No';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(105; "Sort No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Sort No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(106; "Version No."; Integer)
        {
            Caption = 'Version No.';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(107; "System-Created"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'System-Created';
            DataClassification = SystemMetadata;
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(108; "Service Item Status(Purchase)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Purchase)")
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Purchase)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
            Caption = 'Status (Purchase)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(109; "Service Item Status (Sales)"; Enum "TSRM Status(Sales)")
        {
            CalcFormula = lookup("Service Item"."TSRM Status(Sales)" where("No." = field("Service Item No.")));
            Caption = 'Status (Sales)';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(110; "Sales Calculation Status"; Enum "TSRD Sales Calculation Status")
        {
            Caption = 'Configure Price Quote Status';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Field was never needed.';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2502.251100';
        }
        field(111; "Standard Equipment"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula = exist("TSRD Standard Equipment" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Standard Configuration';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(115; "Discounted Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Discounted Machine Sales Price';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Field was missnamed in conception. Actual field is "Calculated Machine Sales Price"';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(120; "Show discounted Sales Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show discounted Sales Prices';
            Editable = false;
            ObsoleteReason = 'Field was missnamed in conception. Actual field is "Show Calculated Sales Prices"';
            ObsoleteState = Pending;
            ObsoleteTag = '2402';
        }
        field(121; "Show List Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show List Prices';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Show List Prices" then
                    TestField("Show calculated Sales Prices", false);
                UpdateListPrice();
                UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice()
            end;
        }
        field(122; "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                MinimumMargin: Decimal;
                MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
            begin
                "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
                "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" / ("Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
                MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");

                if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
                    Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
            end;
        }
        field(123; "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Surcharge Amount (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(124; "Surcharge % (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            AutoFormatExpression = '<precision, 1:2><standard format,0>';
            AutoFormatType = 10;
            Caption = 'Surcharge % (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(125; "Purchase Order Type"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Purchase Order Type';
            TableRelation = "Service Order Type".Code where("TSR Purchase" = const(true));
        }
        field(126; "Responsibility Center"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Responsibility Center';
            TableRelation = "Responsibility Center".Code;

            trigger OnLookup()
            var
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
                RespCenterCode: Code[10];
            begin
                RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.LookUpRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                if RespCenterCode <> '' then
                    Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
            end;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
            begin
                RespCenterSetupMgt.CheckRespCenter(Rec."Responsibility Center", "TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase);
                CalcForecastMgt.SetLocationFromResponsibilityCenter(Rec."Location Code", Rec."Responsibility Center");
            end;
        }
        field(127; "Fix Price allowed"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Fix Price allowed';

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
                FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr: Label 'Fix Price has already been calculated. Please remove the Fix Price first';
                ReturnTypeErr: Label 'You can''t set Fix Price Allowed if Return Type is set.';
            begin
                if not Rec."Fix Price allowed" then begin
                    Rec."Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)" := 0;
                    Rec."Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := 0;
                    Rec."Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := 0;
                end else begin
                    if Rec."Return Type" <> Rec."Return Type"::" " then
                        Error(ReturnTypeErr);
                    CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
                    if CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
                        Error(FixPriceAlreadyCalculatedErr);
                    TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Fix Price allowed"));
                    CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate();
                    CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate();
                end;
            end;
        }
        field(128; "Calculated Machine Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Machine Sales Price';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(129; "Show calculated Sales Prices"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Show calculated Sales Prices';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Show calculated Sales Prices" then begin
                    TestField("Show List Prices", false);
                    TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(FieldCaption("Show calculated Sales Prices"));
                    UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices();
                end else
                    EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields();
            end;
        }
        field(130; "Includes Sales Discount"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Includes Sales Discount';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if "Includes Sales Discount" then
                    if "Margin %" <> "Calculated Margin %" then
                        Validate("Margin %", "Calculated Margin %");
            end;
        }
        field(131; "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Fixed Asset Calc. Sales Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
                CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
                MinimumMargin: Decimal;
                MarginTooLowErr: Label 'The calculated Fix Price for %1 must not be below the minimum margin.', Comment = '%1 = Calculation Worksheet No.';
            begin
                if Rec."Service Item In Stock As" <> Rec."Service Item In Stock As"::"Fixed Asset" then
                    exit;
                "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)" := "FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", GetCalculatedUnitCost());
                "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" := ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" / ("FA Calc. SalPrice (Fix Price)" - "Surchage Amount (Fix Price)") - 1) * 100;
                MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");

                if "Surcharge % (Fix Price)" < MinimumMargin then
                    Error(MarginTooLowErr, Rec."No.");
            end;
        }
        field(132; "VAT Prod. Posting Group"; Code[20])
        {
            Caption = 'VAT Prod. Posting Group';
            TableRelation = "VAT Product Posting Group";

            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
                VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
            begin
                if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
                    exit;
                CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
                VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group");
                UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
            end;
        }
        field(135; "Sales Price incl. VAT"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price incl. VAT';

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                Validate("Sales Price", "Sales Price incl. VAT" * (100 / (100 + "VAT %")));
            end;
        }
        field(140; "VAT %"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'VAT %';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(145; "VAT Amount"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'VAT Amount';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(150; "Service Item In Stock As"; Enum "TSRM In Stock As")
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item In Stock As';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(151; "Calculated Price (Fix Price)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Price (Fix Price)';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(152; "Configuration Sales Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula = sum("TSRD Calc. Configuration"."Calculated Sales Price" where("Forecast No." = field("No.")));
            Caption = 'Configuration Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(160; "Calculation Currency"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Currency';
            TableRelation = Currency;
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
            begin
                GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
                if ("Calculation Currency" = "Sales Currency") and
                   ("Calculation Currency" <> '') and
                   ("Calculation Currency" = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
                    Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
                PrefillCalcExchangeRate();
                UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier();
            end;
        }
        field(165; "Calc Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculation Currency Exchange Rate';
            DecimalPlaces = 4;
            InitValue = 1;
            trigger OnValidate()
            var
                CalcCurrExchangeRateErr: Label 'Exchange Rate cannot be 0';
                CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr: Label 'Calculation Currency is not defined';
            begin
                if ("Calculation Currency" = '') and (CurrFieldNo = (FieldNo("Calc Currency Exchange Rate"))) then
                    Error(CalculationCurrNotDefinedErr);
                if "Calc Currency Exchange Rate" = 0 then
                    Error(CalcCurrExchangeRateErr);
            end;
        }
        field(170; "Calculated Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Calculated Sales Price';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(175; "Sales Price (SCC)"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Price';
            MinValue = 0;

            trigger OnValidate()
            begin
                if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Sales Price (SCC)") then
                    UpdateSalesPriceFromSCC();
            end;
        }
        field(180; "Sales Currency Exchange Rate"; Decimal)
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Currency Exchange Rate';
            DecimalPlaces = 4;
            Editable = false;
            InitValue = 1;
        }
        field(185; "Sales Currency"; Code[10])
        {
            Caption = 'Sales Currency';
            Editable = false;
            TableRelation = Currency;
        }
        field(190; "Service Item Calculation"; Boolean)
        {
            Caption = 'Service Item Calculation Worksheet';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(200; "Over-Allowance Cost"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula =
                sum(
                    "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Over-Allowance Allocation"
                    where(
                        "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
                        "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
                    )
                );
            Caption = 'Over-Allowance Cost';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(201; "Over-Allowance Price"; Decimal)
        {
            CalcFormula =
                sum(
                    "TSRD Return Value Allocation"."Return Price Allocation"
                    where(
                        "Sales Calculation No." = field("Calc. Sales Forecast No."),
                        "Source Forecast No." = field("No.")
                    )
                );
            Caption = 'Over-Allowance Price';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(202; "Over-Allowance Lines Exist"; Boolean)
        {
            CalcFormula =
                exist(
                    "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch"
                    where(
                        "Forecast No." = field("No."),
                        "Over-Allowance Value" = filter(<> 0),
                        "Over-Allowance Posted" = const(false)
                    )
                );
            Caption = 'Over-Allowance Lines Exist';
            Editable = false;
            FieldClass = FlowField;
        }
        field(983; "Service Activities"; Enum "TSRD CPQ Related Activities")
        {
            Caption = 'Service Activities';
            Editable = false;
        }
        field(984; "Return Status"; Enum "TSRD CPQ Related Activities")
        {
            Caption = 'Return Status';
            Editable = false;
        }

    }
    keys
    {
        key(PK; "No.")
        {
            Clustered = true;
        }
        key(ServiceItemNoKey; "Service Item No.")
        {
        }
        key(SortKey; "Sort No.", "Version No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
        {
        }
        key(SalesPriceKey; "Calc. Sales Forecast No.")
        {
            MaintainSiftIndex = true;
            SumIndexFields = "Sales Price";
        }
        key(TemplateKey; Template, "System-Created", "Purchase Document Type", "Purchase Document No.", "Base Code")
        {
        }
        key(StatusKey; Status)
        {
        }
    }
    trigger OnInsert()
    var
    begin
        if "No." = '' then
            GenerateNoSeries(true);
        "Creation Date" := Today();
        "Creation by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
        InitOrderType();
        InitResponsibilityCenter();
        TestMandatoryFields();
        UpdateDescription();
        CheckServItemCalculation();
    end;

    trigger OnModify()
    var
    begin
        TestStatusOpen();
        "Last Date Modified" := Today();
        "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
        TestMandatoryFields();
    end;

    trigger OnRename()
    begin
        "Last Date Modified" := Today();
        "Last Modified by User" := CopyStr(UserId(), 1, 50);
        TestMandatoryFields();
    end;

    trigger OnDelete()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        TestStatusOpen();
        TestSystemCreatedFalse();
        TestSalesCalculationStatus();
        if not SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader then
            CalcForecastMgt.ClearForecastNoInPurchaseOrder(Rec."No.");
        CalcForecastMgt.RenumberSortNos(Rec);
    end;

    procedure GenerateNoSeries(FromTemplate: Boolean)
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        case FromTemplate of
            true:
                begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
                    "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Template Forecast Nos.");
                    Template := true;
                end;
            false:
                begin
                    SalesReceivablesSetup.TestField(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
                    "No." := NoSeries.GetNextNo(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Forecast Nos.");
                end;
        end
    end;

    procedure GetNextLineNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Line No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit(10000);
        CalcForecast.FindLast();
        exit(CalcForecast."Line No." + 10000);
    end;

    procedure GetNextSortNo(): Integer
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetCurrentKey("Sort No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Calc. Sales Forecast No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", "Version No.");
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit(1);
        CalcForecast.FindLast();
        exit(CalcForecast."Sort No." + 1);
    end;

    procedure SetSkipCheckSystemCreated(NewSkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipCheckSystemCreated := NewSkipCheckSystemCreated;
    end;

    internal procedure GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal
    var
        Handled: Boolean;
    begin
