        OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, BaseMachineListPriceSales);
        if Handled then
            exit;
        exit(Rec."Base Machine List Price");
    end;

    internal procedure GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() ListPriceSales: Decimal
    var
        Handled: Boolean;
    begin
        OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(Rec, Handled, ListPriceSales);
        if Handled then
            exit;
        exit(Rec."List Price");
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateDescription()
    var
        StringMgt: Codeunit "TSR String Mgt.";
        ReturnList: List of [Text];
        Descr: Text;
        xDescr: Text;
    begin
        CalcFields("Manufacturer Name", "Subcategory Name", "Series Name", "Model Name");
        Descr := "Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + "Subcategory Name" + ' ' + "Series Name" + ' ' + "Model Name";
        xDescr := xRec."Manufacturer Name" + ' ' + xRec."Subcategory Name" + ' ' + xRec."Series Name" + ' ' + xRec."Model Name";
        Descr := Descr.Trim().Replace('  ', ' ');
        xDescr := xDescr.Trim().Replace('  ', ' ');
        if Description <> '' then
            if Description <> xDescr then
                exit;
        if StringMgt.SplitStringSpecificLen(Descr, MaxStrLen(Description), ' ', ReturnList) then
            Validate(Description, ReturnList.Get(1));
    end;

    internal procedure GetDate(): Date
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") and (CalcSalesForecast.Date <> 0D) then
            exit(CalcSalesForecast.Date);
        exit(WorkDate());
    end;

    internal procedure GetStatusStyleText() StatusStyleText: Text
    begin
        case Status of
            Status::Open:
                StatusStyleText := 'Favorable';
            Status::Alternative:
                StatusStyleText := 'StrongAccent'
            else
                StatusStyleText := 'Strong';
        end;

        OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec, StatusStyleText);
    end;

    procedure SetSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader(NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader := NewSkipUpdatePurchaseHeader;
    end;

    procedure TestStatusOpen()
    begin
        if DoNotTestStatusOpen or StatusCheckSuspended then
            exit;
        if not (Rec.Status in [Status::Open, Status::Alternative]) then
            Rec.FieldError(Status);
    end;

    internal procedure TestSalesCalculationStatus()
    var
        StatusWonOrLostErr: Label 'Configure Price Quote status is either won or lost. You can''t change the Calculation Worksheet.';
    begin
        if Rec.GetStatusCheckSuspended() then
            exit;
        if Rec.GetSalesCalculationStatus() in ["TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won, "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Lost] then
            Error(StatusWonOrLostErr);
    end;

    procedure GetCalculatedUnitCost() CalculatedUnitCost: Decimal
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options", "Over-Allowance Cost");
        case true of
            "Show calculated Sales Prices":
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."Configuration Price"
                                       + "Base Machine List Price"
                                       + "Equipment Price"
                                       + "Total Costs"
                                       + "Workshop Amount"
                                       - "Total Discount";
            "Show List Prices":
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price Conf. Options"
                                           + "Base Machine List Price"
                                           + "Equipment Price"
                                           + "Total Costs"
                                           + "Workshop Amount"
                                           - "Total Discount";
            else
                CalculatedUnitCost := Rec."List Price"
                                           + "Equipment Price"
                                           + "Total Costs"
                                           + "Workshop Amount"
                                           - "Total Discount";
        end;

        if "Over-Allowance Cost" > 0 then
            CalculatedUnitCost += "Over-Allowance Cost";
    end;

    internal procedure GetCalculatedUnitPrice() CalculatedUnitPrice: Decimal
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Costs", "Total Sales Discount", "Equipment Price", "Workshop Amount");
        CalculatedUnitPrice := Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc()
                                   + "Equipment Price"
                                   + "Total Costs"
                                   + "Workshop Amount"
                                   - "Total Sales Discount";
    end;

    local procedure CheckAndFixMinimumMargin()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
        MinimumMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
        if "Margin %" >= MinimumMargin then
            exit;
        "Margin %" := MinimumMargin;
        if "Sales Price" <= 0 then
            exit;
        if xRec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" <> Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate" then
            exit;
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
    end;

    internal procedure CheckMargingSetToMinimumMargin()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
        MinimumMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
        if ("Margin %" = MinimumMargin) and (xRec."Margin %" > Rec."Margin %") then
            NotificationManagement.CreateAndSendNotification(MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr, RecordId);
    end;

    procedure UpdateCalcSalesPrice()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateCalcSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        MinimumMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        if "Sales Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        if "Includes Sales Discount" then begin
            "Sales Price" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice();
            UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
            "Margin Amount" := GetCalculatedUnitPrice() - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
            "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), GetCalculatedUnitPrice());
            MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                               Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
            if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then begin
                if CurrFieldNo = FieldNo("Base Machine List Price") then
                    "Base Machine List Price" := xRec."Base Machine List Price";
                UpdateListPrice();
                FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
            end;
        end
        else begin
            MinimumMargin := MarginSetup.GetMinimumMarginPercentage(Rec."Manufacturer Code", Rec."Category Code",
                                                                Rec."Subcategory Code", Rec."Series Code", Rec."Model Code");
            if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
                FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
            else begin
                "Margin %" := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Sales Price");
                if "Margin %" < MinimumMargin then
                    FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin();
                "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
            end;
        end;
        Rec.Modify();
    end;

    local procedure FixAccordingtoMinimumMargin()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CheckAndFixMinimumMargin();
        "Sales Price" := CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetCalculatedUnitCost(), "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
        UpdateSalesPriceSCC();
        "Margin Amount" := "Sales Price" - GetCalculatedUnitCost();
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateSalesPrice()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateSalesPrice(Rec, SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model");
        UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcMarginPercentage()
    var
        MarginSetup: Record "TSRD Margin Setup";
        MarginPercentage: Decimal;
    begin
        MarginPercentage := MarginSetup.GetMarginPercentage("Manufacturer Code", "Category Code", "Subcategory Code", "Series Code", "Model Code");
        Validate("Calculated Margin %", MarginPercentage);
        Validate("Margin %", MarginPercentage);
    end;

    local procedure TestSystemCreatedFalse()
    begin
        if not SkipCheckSystemCreated or StatusCheckSuspended then
            TestField("System-Created", false);
    end;

    local procedure TestMandatoryFields()
    var
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
    begin
        TestField("Manufacturer Code");
        TestField("Category Code");
        TestField("Model Code");
        if ServiceMgt.IsSubcategoryMandatory() then
            TestField("Subcategory Code");
        if ServiceMgt.IsSeriesMandatory() then
            TestField("Series Code");
    end;

    local procedure CheckAttributesOnConfigurations()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        AttributeChangeErr: Label '%1 cannot be changed since it is used in Configurations. Delete Configuration Lines in order to change %1.', Comment = '%1=Manufacturer Code/Category Code/Subcategory Code/Model Code';
    begin
        case CurrFieldNo of
            FieldNo("Manufacturer Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Manufacturer Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Manufacturer Code" = xRec."Manufacturer Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Manufacturer Code", '<>%1', "Manufacturer Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Manufacturer Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Category Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Category Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Category Code" = xRec."Category Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Category Code", '<>%1', "Category Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Category Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Subcategory Code"):
                begin

                    if xRec."Subcategory Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Subcategory Code" = xRec."Subcategory Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Subcategory Code", '<>%1', "Subcategory Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Subcategory Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Series Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Series Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Series Code" = xRec."Series Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Series Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Series Code"));
                end;
            FieldNo("Model Code"):
                begin
                    if xRec."Model Code" = '' then
                        exit;
                    if "Model Code" = xRec."Model Code" then
                        exit;
                    CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("Model Code", '<>%1', "Model Code");
                    CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', '');
                    if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
                        Error(AttributeChangeErr, FieldCaption("Model Code"));
                end;
        end;
    end;

    internal procedure SetCalculationCurrencyFromVendor(VendorNo: Code[20])
    var
        Vendor: Record Vendor;
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg: Label 'The vendor has the currency code %1. Do you want to use it in calculation worksheet?', Comment = '%1 - Vendor Currency Code';
    begin
        if not Vendor.Get(VendorNo) then
            exit;
        if Vendor."Currency Code" = '' then
            exit;
        if Vendor."Currency Code" = Rec."Calculation Currency" then
            exit;
        if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponse(StrSubstNo(ExchangeCurrencyConfirmMsg, Vendor."Currency Code")) then
            exit;
        Rec.Validate("Calculation Currency", Vendor."Currency Code");
        Rec.Modify();
    end;

    procedure SetDoNotTestStatusOpen(NewDoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean)
    begin
        DoNotTestStatusOpen := NewDoNotTestStatusOpen;
    end;

    procedure UpdateListPrice()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        LineAmount: Decimal;
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcConfiguration.CalcSums("Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Line Amount (List Price)");
        if "Show List Prices" then
            LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (List Price)"
        else
            LineAmount := CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)";
        Validate("List Price", LineAmount + "Base Machine List Price");
        OnAfterUpdateListPrice(Rec, LineAmount);
    end;

    internal procedure SetIncludesSalesDiscount(NewIncludesSalesDiscount: Boolean)
    begin
        if "Includes Sales Discount" = NewIncludesSalesDiscount then
            exit;

        Validate("Includes Sales Discount", NewIncludesSalesDiscount);
        Modify();
    end;

    internal procedure GetTotalPurchDiscountPercentage(): Decimal
    var
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
    begin
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.CalcSums("Absolute Discount %");
        exit(CalcPurchaseDiscounts."Absolute Discount %");
    end;

    internal procedure InitOrderType()
    var
        UserSetup: Record "User Setup";
    begin
        if not UserSetup.Get(UserId()) then
            exit;
        if UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type" <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Purchase Order Type", UserSetup."TSR Purchase Order Type");
    end;

    internal procedure InitResponsibilityCenter()
    var
        RespCenterSetupMgt: Codeunit "TSR Resp. Center Setup Mgt";
        RespCenterCode: Code[10];
    begin
        RespCenterCode := RespCenterSetupMgt.GetRespCenter("TSR Resp. Center Area"::Purchase, Rec."Vendor No.");
        if RespCenterCode <> '' then
            Rec.Validate("Responsibility Center", RespCenterCode);
    end;

    local procedure CheckIsReturnTypeEditable()
    var
        CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
        ReturnTypeErr: Label 'Return Type cannot be changed after Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document is created. Please first delete Purchase/Trade-In/Agency Business document if it is not posted.';
    begin
        CalcTradeInPurch.SetFilter("Document No.", '<>%1', '');
        CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        if not CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
            Error(ReturnTypeErr);
    end;

    local procedure TestSalesDiscountsEmpty(SalesCalculationOption: Text)
    var
        CalcSalesDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Discounts";
        DiscountsErr: Label 'There are Sales Discounts defined. You have to delete them first to apply "%1"', Comment = '%1 - Configure Price Quote option you''re trying to apply';
    begin
        CalcSalesDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        if not CalcSalesDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            Error(DiscountsErr, SalesCalculationOption);
    end;

    internal procedure EmptyCalculatedSalesPriceFields()
    var
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Price", 0);
        CalcConfiguration.ModifyAll("Calculated Sales Amount", 0);
    end;

    procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices()
    var
        Currency: Record Currency;
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
        PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
        SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
            exit;
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        Currency.Initialize('');
        GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
        if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);

        if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
            SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
            CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
            CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
            CalcConfiguration.Modify();
        end;
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateConfigCalculatedSalesPrices(var CurrCalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration")
    var
        Currency: Record Currency;
        CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration";
        PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal;
        PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal, SplitDiff : Decimal;
        SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal;
    begin
        if not "Show calculated Sales Prices" then
            exit;
        if "List Price" = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
        Currency.Initialize('');
        GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(PriceWithoutMargin, SalesPriceWithMargin, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);
        if SalesPriceWithMargin = 0 then
            exit;
        SalesPriceSplitTotal += "Calculated Machine Sales Price";
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("No.", '<>%1', CurrCalcConfiguration."No.");
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter("List Price", '<>%1', 0);
        CalcConfiguration.SetFilter(Quantity, '<>%1', 0);
        if CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(CalcConfiguration, SalesPriceSplitTotal, PurchDiscountMultiplier, Currency);

        if SalesPriceSplitTotal <> SalesPriceWithMargin then begin
            SplitDiff := SalesPriceWithMargin - SalesPriceSplitTotal;
            CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" -= SplitDiff;
            CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := Round(CurrCalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CurrCalcConfiguration.Quantity, Currency."Unit-Amount Rounding Precision");
            CurrCalcConfiguration.Modify();
        end;
    end;

    local procedure GetCalculatedMachineSalesPrice(var PriceWithoutMargin: Decimal; var SalesPriceWithMargin: Decimal; var PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcFields("Total Discount", "Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc", "Configuration Price", "List Price Conf. Options");
        if "Show List Prices" then
            PriceWithoutMargin := "List Price Conf. Options" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount"
        else
            PriceWithoutMargin := "Configuration Price" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() - "Total Discount";

        SalesPriceWithMargin := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(PriceWithoutMargin,
                                                                              "Margin %",
                                                                              SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
        if (SalesPriceWithMargin = 0) or ("List Price" = 0) then begin
            "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := 0;
            exit;
        end;
        if "Total Discount" <> 0 then
            PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1 - "Total Discount" / ("Dir unit cost with Calc. Disc" + GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
        else
            PurchDiscountMultiplier := 1;

        "Calculated Machine Sales Price" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc() * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcConfigLinesCalculatedSalesPrices(var CalcConfiguration: Record "TSRD Calc. Configuration"; var SalesPriceSplitTotal: Decimal; PurchDiscountMultiplier: Decimal; Currency: Record Currency)
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", true);
        if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
            repeat
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)" * PurchDiscountMultiplier, "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
                SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
            until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
        end;

        CalcConfiguration.SetRange("Calculate Discount", false);
        if not CalcConfiguration.IsEmpty() then begin
            CalcConfiguration.FindSet();
            repeat
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" := Round(CalcForecastMgt.GetSalesPriceWithMargin(CalcConfiguration."Line Amount (Direct Unit Cost)", "Margin %", SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model"), Currency."Amount Rounding Precision");
                CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Price" := CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount" / CalcConfiguration.Quantity;
                CalcConfiguration.Modify();
                SalesPriceSplitTotal += CalcConfiguration."Calculated Sales Amount";
            until CalcConfiguration.Next() = 0;
        end;
    end;

    internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
        PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, true);
    end;

    internal procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    begin
        PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast, false);
    end;

    local procedure PrefillVATProdPostingGroup(CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; ExecuteValidate: Boolean)
    var
        Item: Record Item;
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
    begin
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
            exit;
        if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then begin
            Clear(Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
            exit;
        end;
        ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
        if not Item.Get(ServiceItem."Item No.") then
            exit;

        VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group");
        if ExecuteValidate then
            Rec.Validate("VAT Prod. Posting Group", Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group")
        else
            Rec."VAT Prod. Posting Group" := Item."VAT Prod. Posting Group";

        UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup")
    var
        VATCalculationTypeErr: Label 'Calculation Type Full VAT in VAT Posting Setup is not possible in Configure Price Quote';
    begin
        case VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type" of
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Reverse Charge VAT",
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Sales Tax":
                "VAT %" := 0;
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Normal VAT":
                "VAT %" := VATPostingSetup."VAT %";
            VATPostingSetup."VAT Calculation Type"::"Full VAT":
                Error(VATCalculationTypeErr);
        end;
        UpdateVATAmount();
        UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT();
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateVAT()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
        VATPostingSetup: Record "VAT Posting Setup";
    begin
        if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Sales Price incl. VAT" then
            exit;
        if not VATPostingSetup.Get(CalcSalesForecast."VAT Bus. Posting Group", "VAT Prod. Posting Group") then
            exit;
        UpdateVATPercentage(VATPostingSetup);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesPriceInclVAT()
    begin
        "Sales Price incl. VAT" := "Sales Price" * (1 + "VAT %" / 100);
    end;

    local procedure UpdateVATAmount()
    begin
        "VAT Amount" := "Sales Price" * ("VAT %" / 100);
    end;

    local procedure SetCalculationCurrency()
    var
        Manufacturer: Record Manufacturer;
    begin
        if "Manufacturer Code" = '' then begin
            Clear("Calculation Currency");
            exit;
        end;
        Manufacturer.Get("Manufacturer Code");
        if ("Sales Currency" = Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code") and
           (Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '') then
            Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
        if Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code" <> '' then
            Validate("Calculation Currency", Manufacturer."TSRD Calculation Currency Code");
    end;

    internal procedure PrefillSalesCurrency()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if "Calc. Sales Forecast No." = '' then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.");
        if (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" = "Calculation Currency") and (CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency" <> '') then
            Error(SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr);
        Validate("Sales Currency", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency");
        Validate("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate");
    end;

    local procedure UpdateAllPricesWithMultiplier()
    var
        CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        CurrSalesPrice: Decimal;
        ExchangeRate: Decimal;
        PriceMultuplier: Decimal;
        xExchangeRate: Decimal;
    begin
        if Rec."Calculation Currency" = xRec."Calculation Currency" then
            exit;
        ExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), Rec."Calculation Currency");
        xExchangeRate := CurrencyExchangeRate.ExchangeRate(Today(), xRec."Calculation Currency");

        if (ExchangeRate = 0) or (xExchangeRate = 0) then
            exit;

        PriceMultuplier := ExchangeRate / xExchangeRate;
        if PriceMultuplier = 1 then
            exit;
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateAllForecastPricesWithMultiplier(Rec."No.", PriceMultuplier);
        CurrSalesPrice := "Sales Price";
        "Base Machine List Price" := "Base Machine List Price" * PriceMultuplier;
        UpdateListPrice();
        CalcForecastMgt.RecalculatePurchDiscountsOnDealerNetPriceChange(Rec);
        UpdateCalcSalesPrice();
        Validate("Sales Price", CurrSalesPrice * PriceMultuplier);
    end;

    local procedure CheckCalcWorkShopForSeparate()
    var
        CalcWorkshop: Record "TSRD Calc. Workshop";
        SeparateWorkshopErr: Label 'There are Services with "Calculate Separately" defined. You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
    begin
        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcWorkshop.SetRange("Calculate Separately", true);
        if not CalcWorkshop.IsEmpty() then
            Error(SeparateWorkshopErr);
    end;

    local procedure CheckCalcExternalEquipmentForSeparate()
    var
        CalcExternalEquipment: Record "TSRD Calc. External Equipment";
        SeparateEquipmentErr: Label 'There are Additional Configurations with "Calculate Separately" defined. You have to delete them first to Allow Fix Price.';
    begin
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Forecast No.", "No.");
        CalcExternalEquipment.SetRange("Calculate Separately", true);
        if not CalcExternalEquipment.IsEmpty() then
            Error(SeparateEquipmentErr);
    end;

    internal procedure ReInitOrderTypeAndResponsibilityCenter()
    var
        CalcTradeInPurch: Record "TSRD Calc. Trade-In/Purch";
    begin
        CalcTradeInPurch.SetRange("Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
        if CalcTradeInPurch.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcTradeInPurch.FindSet(true);
        repeat
            CalcTradeInPurch.InitOrderType();
            CalcTradeInPurch.InitResponsibilityCenter();
            CalcTradeInPurch.Modify(true);
        until CalcTradeInPurch.Next() = 0;
    end;

    procedure UpdateAllPriceRelatedFields()
    begin
        UpdateListPrice();
        UpdateCalcMarginPercentage();
        UpdateMarginAndSalesPrice();
    end;

    local procedure UpdateCalcSalesPriceSCC()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Validate("Calculated Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calculated Sales Price"));
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateSalesPriceSCC()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Validate("Sales Price (SCC)", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price"));
    end;

    local procedure UpdateSalesPriceFromSCC()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        Validate("Sales Price", CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY("Sales Currency Exchange Rate", "Calc Currency Exchange Rate", "Sales Price (SCC)"));
    end;

    local procedure PrefillCalcExchangeRate()
    var
        CurrencyExchangeRate: Record "Currency Exchange Rate";
        LatestDate: Date;
        ExchangeRateAmount: Decimal;
    begin
        if "Calculation Currency" = '' then begin
            Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", 1);
            exit;
        end;
        CurrencyExchangeRate.GetLastestExchangeRate("Calculation Currency", LatestDate, ExchangeRateAmount);
        Validate("Calc Currency Exchange Rate", ExchangeRateAmount);
    end;

    local procedure GetCaptionWithCurrencyCode(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode: Text; Currency: Code[10]): Text
    var
        GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
    begin
        if Currency = '' then
            exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
        GeneralLedgerSetup.Get();
        if Currency = GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code" then
            exit(CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode);
        exit(StrSubstNo('%1 (%2)', CaptionWithoutCurrencyCode, Currency));
    end;

    local procedure CheckServItemCalculation()
    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        ServItemCalcErr: Label 'There already exist a Service Item Calculation Worksheet for Service Item No. %1', Comment = '%1 Service Item No.';
    begin
        if not Rec."Service Item Calculation" then
            exit;
        if CalcForecastMgt.HasServiceItemCalculation(Rec."Service Item No.") then
            Error(ServItemCalcErr, Rec."Service Item No.");
    end;

    procedure CreatePurchaseOrder()
    var
        CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
    begin
        CalcForecastToPurch.CreatePurchaseOrder(Rec);
    end;

    procedure OpenPurchaseDocument()
    var
        CalcForecastToPurch: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast To Purch";
    begin
        CalcForecastToPurch.OpenPurchaseDocument(Rec."Purchase Document Type", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
    end;

    procedure OpenListOfPOs()
    var
        PurchaseHeader: Record "Purchase Header";
    begin
        if not Rec.Template then
            exit;
        PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(2);
        PurchaseHeader.SetRange("Document Type", PurchaseHeader."Document Type"::Order);
        PurchaseHeader.SetRange("TSRD Forecast No.", Rec."No.");
        PurchaseHeader.FilterGroup(0);
        Page.Run(Page::"Purchase Order List", PurchaseHeader);
    end;

    internal procedure CopyUnitCostOfServiceItem()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
        UnitCost: Decimal;
    begin
        if "Service Item No." = '' then begin
            if CheckLinkedDocument() then
                SetBaseMachinePrice(0);
            exit;
        end;
        ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
        ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
        if not GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice() then
            SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
    end;

    local procedure CheckLinkedDocument(): Boolean
    var
        PurchInvLine: Record "Purch. Inv. Line";
        PurchaseLine: Record "Purchase Line";
    begin
        if (xRec."Service Item No." = '') or (Rec."Purchase Document No." = '') then
            exit(true);
        PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document Type", "Purchase Document Type"::Order);
        PurchaseLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
        PurchaseLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");

        PurchInvLine.SetRange("Document No.", Rec."Purchase Document No.");
        PurchInvLine.SetRange("TSRM Service Item No.", xRec."Service Item No.");
        if PurchaseLine.IsEmpty() and PurchInvLine.IsEmpty() then
            exit(true);
    end;

    internal procedure HandleEquipment()
    var
        EquipmentMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Equipment Mgt.";
    begin
        EquipmentMgt.TransferStandardEquipmentAndModel(Rec, xRec);
        EquipmentMgt.DeleteForecastEquipmentOnServItemNoValidate(Rec, xRec);
        EquipmentMgt.DeleteServiceItemLinkedEquipment(Rec);
        EquipmentMgt.CopyServiceItemEquipmentToForecast(Rec);
        EquipmentMgt.ServiceItemEquipmentToStandardEquipment(Rec);
    end;

    local procedure SetBaseMachinePrice(NewBasePrice: Decimal)
    var
        Margin: Decimal;
    begin
        Margin := "Margin %";
        Validate("Base Machine List Price", NewBasePrice);
        Validate("Margin %", Margin);
    end;

    internal procedure SetBaseMachineListPrice()
    var
        ServiceItem: Record "Service Item";
        ConfirmMgt: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        ServiceMgt: Codeunit "TSRM Service Mgt.";
        UnitCost: Decimal;
        ConfirmLbl: Label 'Calculation Review is not approved. When creating a Calculation Worksheet, the Base Machine List Price will be set to ''0'', do you want to continue?';
    begin
        if Rec."Service Item No." = '' then
            exit;
        ServiceItem.Get(Rec."Service Item No.");
        SalesReceivablesSetup.GetRecordOnce();
        case SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Base Machine List Price" of
            "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Unit Cost of Service Item":
                ServiceMgt.CalculateServiceItemCardUnitCost(ServiceItem, UnitCost, false);
            "TSRD Base Machine List Price"::"Calculation Unit Cost":
                if not (ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Review Status" in [
                    "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::Approved,
                    "TSRM Calc. Review Status"::"No Calc. Review Required"
                ])
                then begin
                    if not ConfirmMgt.GetResponse(ConfirmLbl) then
                        Error('')
                    else
                        UnitCost := 0
                end else
                    UnitCost := ServiceItem."TSRM Calc. Unit Cost";
        end;
        SetBaseMachinePrice(UnitCost);
    end;

    internal procedure TestStatusOpenSalesCalc()
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("No.", Rec.GetFilter("Calc. Sales Forecast No."));
        CalcSalesForecast.SetFilter("Version No.", Rec.GetFilter("Version No."));
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.FindFirst();
        CalcSalesForecast.TestStatusOpen();
    end;

    internal procedure SetStatusCheckSuspended(Suspend: Boolean)
    begin
        StatusCheckSuspended := Suspend;
    end;

    internal procedure GetStatusCheckSuspended(): Boolean
    begin
        exit(StatusCheckSuspended);
    end;

    internal procedure SetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(Skip: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipBaseMachineListPrice := Skip;
    end;

    internal procedure GetSkipBaseMachineListPrice(): Boolean
    begin
        exit(SkipBaseMachineListPrice);
    end;

    internal procedure SetSkipRelatedActivities(Skip: Boolean)
    begin
        SkipRelatedActivities := Skip;
    end;

    internal procedure GetSkipRelatedActivities(): Boolean
    begin
        exit(SkipRelatedActivities);
    end;

    procedure GetSalesCalculationStatus(): Enum "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if not CalcSalesForecast.Get("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", "Version No.") then
            exit("TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::" ");
        exit(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Calculation Status");
    end;

    protected var
        SkipCheckSystemCreated: Boolean;
        SkipUpdatePurchaseHeader: Boolean;

    var
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        NoSeries: Codeunit "No. Series";
        DoNotTestStatusOpen: Boolean;
        FromCPQDelete: Boolean;
        SkipBaseMachineListPrice: Boolean;
        SkipRelatedActivities: Boolean;
        StatusCheckSuspended: Boolean;
        CalculatedMarginLbl: Label 'Calc. ';
        MarginTooLowResetingToMinimumErr: Label 'Margin too low. Reseting to minimum margin';
        SameSalesAndCalcCurrencyErr: Label 'You can''t set up the same value for Sales and Calculation Currency.';

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterGetStatusStyleText(Rec: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var StatusStyleText: Text)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeGetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var Handled: Boolean; var BaseMachineListPriceSales: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnBeforeGetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalculation(CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; var Handled: Boolean; var ListPriceSales: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

    [IntegrationEvent(false, false)]
    local procedure OnAfterUpdateListPrice(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast"; LineAmount: Decimal)
    begin
    end;

}
page 5446016 "TSRD Calc. Forecast FactBox"
{
    Caption = 'Worksheet Calculations';
    PageType = CardPart;
    SourceTable = "TSRD Calc. Forecast";

    layout
    {
        area(Content)
        {
            group(GroupName)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                label(PurchaseCostsLabel)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(PurchaseCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                }
                field("Base Machine List Price"; Rec."Base Machine List Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Base Machine List Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Machine List Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Configuration Price"; Rec."Configuration Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
                }
                field("List Price"; Rec."List Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the List Price field';
                }
                field("Total Discount"; Rec."Total Discount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Total Purchase Discount';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Discount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Discount Amounts from all Purchase discount lines.';
                }
                field("Equipment Price"; Rec."Equipment Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Total Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price field';
                }
                field("Workshop Amount"; Rec."Workshop Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Service';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Workshop Amount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Service Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Total Costs"; Rec."Total Costs")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Costs';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Costs"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                group(OverAllowance)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In") or (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::Purchase) or ShowOverAllowancePrice;
                    field("Over-Allowance Cost"; Rec."Over-Allowance Cost")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        Caption = 'Over-Allowance Cost';
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Over-Allowance Cost field';
                        trigger OnDrillDown()
                        var
                            OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
                        begin
                            OverAllowanceMgt.DrillDownOnForecastFactbox(Rec."No.");
                        end;
                    }
                }
                field(CalculatedUnitCosts; CalculatedUnitCosts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Calculated Unit Costs';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(CalculatedUnitCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Calculated Unit Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("List Price Conf. Options"; Rec."List Price Conf. Options")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    ToolTip = 'Sum of all Configuration Options List Price Amounts.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
            }
            group(Sales)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                Visible = Rec."Includes Sales Discount";

                label(SalesLabel)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales';
                    Style = Strong;
                }
                field("Sales Base Machine List Price"; Rec.GetBaseMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Base Machine List Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Base Machine List Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                group(ConfigurationListPrice)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = Rec."Show List Prices";

                    field("Sales Configuration List Price"; Rec."List Price Conf. Options")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
                    }
                }
                group(ConfigurationPrice)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = not Rec."Show List Prices";

                    field("Sales Configuration Price"; Rec."Configuration Price")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Configuration Price.';
                    }
                }
                field("Sales List Price"; Rec.GetMachineListPriceForSalesPriceCalc())
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'List Price';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the List Price field';
                }
                field("Total Sales Discount"; Rec."Total Sales Discount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = all;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Sales Discount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Discount Amounts from all Sales discount lines.';
                }
                field("Equipment Price (Sales)"; Rec."Equipment Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment Price"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Total Additional Configuration Calculated Sales Price field';
                }
                field("Workshop Amount (Sales)"; Rec."Workshop Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Services';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Workshop Amount"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Service Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Total Costs (Sales)"; Rec."Total Costs")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Costs';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Costs"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Sales Price (without Separate)"; SalesPriceWithoutSeparately)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales Price (without Separate)';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(SalesPriceWithoutSeparateLbl, Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Sales Price for Calculation Worksheet excluding separate calculations.';
                }
                field(DirectCosts; DirectCosts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    Caption = 'Direct Costs';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Direct Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field(UnitPriceInclDiscounts; UnitPriceInclDiscounts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    Caption = 'Unit Costs Incl. Discounts';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Unit Costs Incl. Discounts for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
                field(UnitPriceInclWorkshops; UnitPriceInclWorkshops)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = TSRObsolete;
                    Caption = 'Unit Costs Incl. Services';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Unit Costs Incl. Services for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    Visible = false;
                }
            }
            group(Summary)
            {
                ShowCaption = false;
                label(SummaryLabel)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Summary';
                    Style = Strong;
                }
                field(SummaryCalculatedUnitCosts; CalculatedUnitCosts)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(CalculatedUnitCostsLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Calculated Unit Costs for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Margin %"; Rec."Margin %")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Margin % for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                field("Margin Amount"; Rec."Margin Amount")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Margin Amount field';
                }
                field("Sales Price"; Rec."Sales Price")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales Price (without separate)';
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price"), Rec."No.");
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Sales Price for Calculation Worksheet.';
                }
                group(SalesCurrencySalesPrice)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = not ((Rec."Sales Currency" = '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" = ''));
                    field("Sales Price (SCC)"; Rec."Sales Price (SCC)")
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithSalesCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Sales Price (SCC)"), Rec."No.");
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies Sales Price in sales currency for Calculation Worksheet.';
                    }
                }
                field("Add. Config Price (Sep)"; Rec."Add. Config Price (Sep)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Add. Config Price (Sep)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Unit Cost for Additional Configurations with separate calculation.';
                }
                field("Service Amount (Separate)"; Rec."Service Amount (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Service Amount (Separate)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Service Amount for Services with separate calculation.';
                }
                field("Total Costs (Separate)"; Rec."Total Costs (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Total Costs (Separate)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies Total Costs for Costs with separate calculation.';
                }
                field(TotalCostsAmount; TotalCostsAmount)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Total Costs Amount';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the sum of Calculated Unit Costs and the separate costs.';
                }
                field("Equipment (Separate)"; Rec."Equipment (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Equipment (Separate)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies total of additional configuration with separate calculation.';
                }
                field("Workshop (Separate)"; Rec."Workshop (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Workshop (Separate)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies total of Services with separate calculation.';
                }
                field("Costs (Separate)"; Rec."Costs (Separate)")
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(Rec.FieldCaption("Costs (Separate)"), Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies total of Costs with separate calculation.';
                }
                field(SalesPriceTotal; SalesPriceTotal)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Sales Price Total';
                    Style = Strong;
                    StyleExpr = true;
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the total sales price including separate items.';
                }
                field(TotalMarginPct; TotalMarginPct)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Total Margin %';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the total margin percentage including separate items.';
                }
                field(TotalMargin; TotalMargin)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    Caption = 'Total Margin';
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the total margin amount including separate items.';
                }
                group(ShowTradeIns)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In") or (Rec."Return Type" = Rec."Return Type"::Purchase) or ShowOverAllowancePrice;
                    field(TradeIns; PurchaseTradeInAmt)
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        CaptionClass = GetReturnCaption();
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the amt.';

                        trigger OnDrillDown()
                        var
                            OverAllowanceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Over-Allowance Mgt.";
                        begin
                            OverAllowanceMgt.DrillDownOnForecastFactbox(Rec."No.");
                        end;
                    }
                }
                field("Payment Amount"; PaymentAmt)
                {
                    ApplicationArea = All;
                    CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithCalcCurrencyCode(PaymentAmountLbl, Rec."No.");
                    ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Payment amt.';
                }
                group(SalesCurrencyPaymentAmt)
                {
                    ShowCaption = false;
                    Visible = not ((Rec."Sales Currency" = '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" = ''));
                    field("Payment Amount (SCC)"; PaymentAmtSCC)
                    {
                        ApplicationArea = All;
                        CaptionClass = CalcForecastMgt.GetCaptionWithSalesCurrencyCode(PaymentAmountLbl, Rec."No.");
                        ToolTip = 'Specifies the value of the Payment amt. in sales currency.';
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    var
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        SalesReceivablesSetup: Record "Sales & Receivables Setup";
        ShowOverAllowancePrice: Boolean;
        CalculatedUnitCosts: Decimal;
        DirectCosts: Decimal;
        PaymentAmt: Decimal;
        PaymentAmtSCC: Decimal;
        PurchaseTradeInAmt: Decimal;
        SalesPriceWithoutSeparately: Decimal;
        UnitPriceInclDiscounts: Decimal;
        UnitPriceInclWorkshops: Decimal;
        TotalCostsAmount: Decimal;
        SalesPriceTotal: Decimal;
        TotalMarginPct: Decimal;
        TotalMargin: Decimal;
        CalculatedUnitCostsLbl: Label 'Calculated Unit Costs';
        PaymentAmountLbl: Label 'Payment Amount';
        PurchaseCostsLbl: Label 'Purchase Costs';
        SalesPriceWithoutSeparateLbl: Label 'Sales Price (without Separate)';

    trigger OnAfterGetRecord()
    begin
        CalcUnitPrices();
        CurrPage.Update(false);
    end;

    local procedure CalcUnitPrices()
    begin
        CalculatedUnitCosts := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
        if Rec."Includes Sales Discount" then
            SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitPrice()
        else
            SalesPriceWithoutSeparately := Rec.GetCalculatedUnitCost();
        Rec.CalcFields("Equipment (Separate)", "Workshop (Separate)", "Over-Allowance Price", "Add. Config Price (Sep)", "Service Amount (Separate)", "Total Costs (Separate)", "Costs (Separate)");
        
        TotalCostsAmount := CalculatedUnitCosts + Rec."Add. Config Price (Sep)" + Rec."Service Amount (Separate)" + Rec."Total Costs (Separate)";
        SalesPriceTotal := Rec."Sales Price" + Rec."Equipment (Separate)" + Rec."Workshop (Separate)" + Rec."Costs (Separate)";
        TotalMargin := SalesPriceTotal - TotalCostsAmount;

        if SalesPriceTotal <> 0 then begin
            SalesReceivablesSetup.Get();
            TotalMarginPct := CalcForecastMgt.GetMarginPercentageFromSalesPrice(SalesReceivablesSetup."TSRD Margin Model", TotalCostsAmount, SalesPriceTotal);
        end else
            TotalMarginPct := 0;

        if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then begin
            ShowOverAllowancePrice := true;
            PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, true) + Rec."Over-Allowance Price";
        end else begin
            ShowOverAllowancePrice := false;
            PurchaseTradeInAmt := CalcForecastMgt.CalculatePurchaseAmount(Rec, false);
        end;

        PaymentAmt := SalesPriceTotal - PurchaseTradeInAmt;
        PaymentAmtSCC := CalcForecastMgt.ExchangeAmtFCYtoFCY(Rec."Calc Currency Exchange Rate", Rec."Sales Currency Exchange Rate", PaymentAmt);
    end;

    local procedure GetReturnCaption() Caption: Text
    var
        GeneralLedgerSetup: Record "General Ledger Setup";
        OveraAllowanceLbl: Label 'Trade-In/Purchases';
        PurchaseLbl: Label 'Purchases';
        TradeInLbl: Label 'Trade-Ins';
        CalculationCurrencySuffix: Text;
    begin
        if (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> '') and (Rec."Calculation Currency" <> GeneralLedgerSetup."LCY Code") then
            CalculationCurrencySuffix := StrSubstNo(' (%1)', Rec."Calculation Currency");

        case Rec."Return Type" of
            Rec."Return Type"::Purchase:
                Caption := PurchaseLbl;
            Rec."Return Type"::"Trade-In":
                exit(TradeInLbl + CalculationCurrencySuffix);
        end;
        Rec.CalcFields("Over-Allowance Price");
        if Rec."Over-Allowance Price" <> 0 then
            Caption := OveraAllowanceLbl;

        exit(Caption);
    end;
}
codeunit 5446021 "TSRD Calc. Sales For.-To-Doc"
{
    #region Global Procedure

    procedure ChooseOptionForDoc(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type"): Boolean
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        SalesInvHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        IsHandled: Boolean;
        OrderErr: Label 'It is not possible to create a new Sales %1 because an %2 %3 already exists for the Configure Price Quote.', Comment = '%1 = DocTypeToCreate, %2= Existing Type, %3= Existing No';
        PostedSalesInvoiceLbl: Label 'Posted Sales Invoice';
        SalesConfirmQst: Label 'Sales %1 %2 for Configure Price Quote already exists. \Do you want to update?', Comment = '%1= Document Type, %2 Document No.';
    begin
        if CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No." = '' then
            exit;

        if SalesInvHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
            Error(OrderErr, DocTypeToCreate, PostedSalesInvoiceLbl, SalesInvHeader."No.");

        if not SalesHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
            exit;

        OnBeforeCheckForOrderType(CalcSalesForecast, SalesHeader, IsHandled);
        if not IsHandled then
            if SalesHeader."Document Type" in [DocTypeToCreate, SalesHeader."Document Type"::Invoice] then
                if SalesHeader."Document Type" <> SalesHeader."Document Type"::Quote then
                    Error(OrderErr, DocTypeToCreate, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No.");

        if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(StrSubstNo(SalesConfirmQst, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No."), false) then
            Error('');
        SalesHeader.Delete(true);
        CreateDocFromSalesForecast(CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        exit(true);
    end;

    internal procedure DeleteSalesDocument(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        DeleteQstErr: Label 'Delete %1 ∙ %2?', comment = '%1 Document No., %2 Vendor Name';
    begin
        if not SalesHeader.Get(CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.") then
            exit;
        if not ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(StrSubstNo(DeleteQstErr, SalesHeader."No.", SalesHeader."Sell-to Customer Name"), true) then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.Delete(true);
    end;

    procedure CreateDocFromSalesForecast(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        CalcForecastArchiving: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Archiving";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
        InflationSurchargeMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Inflation Surcharge Mgt.";
        ArchiveReason: Enum "TSRD Calc. Archive Reason";
    begin
        CheckConditionsForCreateSalesDoc(CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        CreateSalesHeader(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        CreateSalesLines(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast, DocTypeToCreate);
        CalculateSalesFixPrice(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
        InflationSurchargeMgt.InsertInflationSurchargeCommentsAfterLinesInserted(SalesHeader);
        CalcForecastMgt.UpdateDocumentForOpportunity(CalcSalesForecast."Opportunity No.", SalesHeader);
        OnAfterCreateSalesDoc(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
        if DocTypeToCreate = "Sales Document Type"::Order then
            CalcForecastMgt.SetSalesCalculationStatus(SalesHeader, "TSRD Sales Calculation Status"::Won);
        OpenSalesDocumentPage(SalesHeader);
        if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Quote then begin
            ArchiveReason := ArchiveReason::"Sales Quote";
            CalcForecastArchiving.ArchiveCalculation(CalcSalesForecast, ArchiveReason);
        end;
    end;

    local procedure OpenSalesDocumentPage(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
    var
        ConfirmManagement: Codeunit "Confirm Management";
        PageManagement: Codeunit "Page Management";
        NotificationManagement: Codeunit "TSR Notification Management";
        ShouldOpenPage: Boolean;
        DocCreatedMsg: Label 'Sales  %1 %2 has been created/updated! Do you want to open the document?', Comment = '%1= Sales Document Type, %2 is document no.';
    begin
        ShouldOpenPage := not NotificationManagement.ConfirmOpenNewDocumentIsEnabled();
        if not ShouldOpenPage then
            ShouldOpenPage := ConfirmManagement.GetResponseOrDefault(
                StrSubstNo(DocCreatedMsg, SalesHeader."Document Type", SalesHeader."No."),
                false
            );
        if ShouldOpenPage then
            PageManagement.PageRun(SalesHeader);
    end;

    #endregion Global Procedure

    #region Internal Procedure
    internal procedure UpdateSalesForecastBeforeDeleteDoc(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; RunTrigger: Boolean)
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if not RunTrigger then
            exit;

        if SalesHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;
        CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        if CheckIfDocIsPartialPosting(SalesHeader) then begin
            CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type"::Invoice);
            CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. No.", GetPostedInvoiceNo(SalesHeader));
            exit;
        end;

        CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. Type"::Quote);
        CalcSalesForecast.ModifyAll("Sales Doc. No.", '');
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateForecastAfterConvertQuote(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; NewSalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
    var
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecast2: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if SalesHeader.IsTemporary() then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcSalesForecast2.Get(CalcSalesForecast."No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
            CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. Type" := NewSalesHeader."Document Type";
            CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := NewSalesHeader."No.";
            CalcSalesForecast2.ReleaseSalesForecast();
        until CalcSalesForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    internal procedure UpdateForecastAfterPostingRelatedInvoiceCompletely(DocumentType: Enum "Sales Document Type"; DocumentNo: Code[20]; NewDocumentNo: Code[20])
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
        CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
        CalcSalesForecast2: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast";
    begin
        if SalesHeader.Get(DocumentType, DocumentNo) then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.SetRange("Sales Doc. No.", DocumentNo);
        if CalcSalesForecast.IsEmpty() then
            exit;

        CalcSalesForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            CalcSalesForecast2.Get(CalcSalesForecast."No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
            CalcSalesForecast2."Sales Doc. No." := NewDocumentNo;
            CalcSalesForecast2.Modify();
        until CalcSalesForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    internal procedure SkipStatusForReturnLine(ReservationEntry: Record "Reservation Entry"; var IsHandled: Boolean)
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        if ReservationEntry."Source Subtype" <> ReservationEntry."Source Subtype"::"0" then
            exit;
        if not SalesLine.Get("Sales Document Type"::Quote, ReservationEntry."Source ID", ReservationEntry."Source Ref. No.") then
            exit;
        if SalesLine."TSRD Calc. Forecast Return" then
            IsHandled := true;
    end;

    internal procedure SkipPriceCalcForForecast(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; var Handled: Boolean)
    var
        SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header";
    begin
        SalesHeader.SetAutoCalcFields("TSRD Sales Forecast Exists");
        if not SalesHeader.Get(SalesLine."Document Type", SalesLine."Document No.") then
            exit;
        if SalesHeader."TSRD Sales Forecast Exists" then
            Handled := true;
    end;

    #endregion Internal Procedure

    #region Local Procedures

    local procedure CheckConditionsForCreateSalesDoc(var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
    var
        CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast";
        EmptyForecastLinesErr: Label 'You cannot create Sales %1 without valid %2.', Comment = '%1 = DocTypeToCreate, %2 is Configure Price Quote lines';
        NoCustomerOrContactWithTemplErr: Label 'Either Customer No. or Contact No. need to be filled in order to create Sales Quote.';
    begin
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Calc. Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
        CalcForecast.SetRange("Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
        CalcForecast.SetFilter(Status, '<>%1', CalcSalesForecast.Status::Alternative);
        if (CalcSalesForecast."Customer No." = '') then
            if (CalcSalesForecast."Contact No." = '') then
                Error(NoCustomerOrContactWithTemplErr);
        if CalcForecast.IsEmpty() then
            Error(EmptyForecastLinesErr, DocTypeToCreate, CalcForecast.TableCaption());

        GetCalcForecast(CalcForecast);
        CheckMandatoryFieldForWorkshops(CalcForecast);
    end;

    internal procedure CheckIfDocIsPartialPosting(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Boolean
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
    begin
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine.SetFilter("Quantity Invoiced", '<>%1', 0);
        exit(not SalesLine.IsEmpty());
    end;

    local procedure GetPostedInvoiceNo(SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"): Code[20]
    var
        SalesInvoiceHeader: Record "Sales Invoice Header";
    begin
        SalesHeader.SetCurrentKey("Posting Date");
        SalesInvoiceHeader.SetRange("Order No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesInvoiceHeader.FindLast();
        exit(SalesInvoiceHeader."No.");
    end;

    local procedure GetCalcForecast(var CalcForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Forecast")
    begin
        CalcForecast.FindSet();
        repeat
            CheckPurchDiscounts(CalcForecast."No.");
        until CalcForecast.Next() = 0;
    end;

    local procedure CheckPurchDiscounts(ForecastNo: Code[20])
    var
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts: Record "TSRD Calc. Purchase Discounts";
        CalcForecastMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Calc. Forecast Mgt.";
    begin
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange("Forecast No.", ForecastNo);
        if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcForecastMgt.SetPurchDiscountStatus(CalcPurchaseDiscounts, WorkDate());
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange(Status, CalcPurchaseDiscounts.Status::Expired);
        if CalcPurchaseDiscounts.IsEmpty() then
            exit;
        CalcForecastMgt.DeleteExpiredPurchaseDiscounts(CalcPurchaseDiscounts, true);
        CalcPurchaseDiscounts.SetRange(Status);
        CalcForecastMgt.CalculateForecastPrice(ForecastNo);
    end;

    local procedure CreateSalesHeader(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast"; DocTypeToCreate: Enum "Sales Document Type")
    begin
        Clear(SalesHeader);
        SalesHeader."No." := CalcSalesForecast."Sales Doc. No.";
        SalesHeader.Validate("Document Type", DocTypeToCreate);
        SalesHeader.Validate("TSRD Sales Forecast No.", CalcSalesForecast."No.");
        SalesHeader.Validate("TSRD Sales Fore. Version No.", CalcSalesForecast."Version No.");
        SalesHeader.Insert(true);
        SalesHeader.SetHideValidationDialog(true);
        if CalcSalesForecast."Sales Order Type" <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("TSR Sales Order Type", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Order Type");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Customer No." <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Sell-to Customer No.", CalcSalesForecast."Customer No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Contact No." <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Sell-to Contact No.", CalcSalesForecast."Contact No.");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Responsibility Center" <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Responsibility Center", CalcSalesForecast."Responsibility Center");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Person in Charge" <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("TSR Person In Charge", CalcSalesForecast."Person in Charge");
        if CalcSalesForecast."Valid Until" <> 0D then
            SalesHeader."Quote Valid Until Date" := CalcSalesForecast."Valid Until";
        TransferBillToDetails(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast);
        if CalcSalesForecast.Salesperson <> '' then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Salesperson Code", CalcSalesForecast.Salesperson);
        SalesHeader.SetHideValidationDialog(false);
        SetCurrencyCodeFromCalcForecast(SalesHeader, CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency", CalcSalesForecast."Sales Currency Exchange Rate");
        if DocTypeToCreate = DocTypeToCreate::Order then
            SalesHeader.Validate("Posting Date", WorkDate());
        SalesHeader.Modify(true);
    end;

    local procedure TransferBillToDetails(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    begin
        if (CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Customer No." = '') then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.Validate("Bill-to Customer No.", CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Customer No.");
        SalesHeader."Bill-to Name" := CalcSalesForecast."Bill-to Name";
    end;

    local procedure CalculateSalesFixPrice(var SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; var CalcSalesForecast: Record "TSRD Calc. Sales Forecast")
    var
        SalesLine: Record "Sales Line";
        FixPrice: Record "TSRD Fix Price";
        FixPriceMgt: Codeunit "TSRD Fix Price Mgt.";
        FAAmount: Decimal;
        PartsAmount: Decimal;
    begin
        if not CalcSalesForecast."Fix Price Calculated" then
            exit;
        SalesHeader.SetStatus(SalesHeader.Status::Released);
        SalesHeader.Modify(true);
        FixPrice.InitRecord("TSRD Fix Price Provider"::"Sales Line",
                            FixPriceMgt.GetFixPriceDocumentType(SalesHeader."Document Type"), SalesHeader."No.",
                            0, SalesHeader."No.");
        PartsAmount := GetLineAmount(SalesLine, SalesHeader, SalesLine.Type::Item);
        FAAmount := GetLineAmount(SalesLine, SalesHeader, SalesLine.Type::"Fixed Asset");
        FixPrice."Fix Price Parts" := PartsAmount;
        FixPrice."Total Price Parts" := PartsAmount;
        FixPrice."Fix Price Fixed Asset" := FAAmount;
        FixPrice."Total Price Fixed Asset" := FAAmount;
        FixPrice."Total Price Amount" := PartsAmount + FAAmount;
        FixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" := PartsAmount + FAAmount;
        CalcSalesForecast.CalcFields("Total Sales Price (Fix Price)");
        FixPrice."Total Sales Price" := CalcSalesForecast."Total Sales Price (Fix Price)";
        FixPrice.Difference := FixPrice."Fix Price Total Amount" - FixPrice."Total Sales Price";
        FixPriceMgt.CalculateFixPrice(FixPrice);
    end;

    local procedure GetLineAmount(var SalesLine: Record "Sales Line"; SalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; Type: Enum "Sales Line Type"): Decimal
    begin
        SalesLine.Reset();
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document Type", SalesHeader."Document Type");
        SalesLine.SetRange("Document No.", SalesHeader."No.");
        SalesLine.SetRange("TSRD Fix Price allowed", true);
        SalesLine.SetRange(Type, Type);
        SalesLine.CalcSums("Line Amount");
        exit(SalesLine."Line Amount");
    end;
